_note: Ready-to-insert interactive_image block for the HIV retrovirus (Class 12 Human Health and Disease). Image keyed via prepare_illustration.py's new 'white' background mode (added 2026-07-15) -- the source PNG had an opaque white background despite the prompt asking for solid deep-charcoal #121316 (visible live in ChatGPT's UI as dark, but the downloaded raster was flattened onto white). Hotspots authored by visual inspection of the cropped/keyed webp, NOT yet browser-verified live -- recommend a quick pass in the prototype to confirm tap-target placement before shipping, especially any nested/adjacent structures.
caption: 📸 Tap each dot to explore — or hit 'Test yourself' to play Label Sprint

hotspots.label: Viral envelope
hotspots.detail: The outer lipid membrane, stolen from the host cell, that encloses the virus.

hotspots.label: Glycoprotein spike
hotspots.detail: Studs the envelope and binds to receptors on host immune cells (CD4 T-cells) to begin infection.

hotspots.label: Matrix protein
hotspots.detail: A protein layer just beneath the envelope that gives the virus its structural shape.

hotspots.label: Capsid
hotspots.detail: The cone-shaped protein shell (core) that protects the viral RNA genome.

hotspots.label: RNA genome
hotspots.detail: The virus's genetic material, carried as two single strands of RNA.

hotspots.label: Reverse transcriptase
hotspots.detail: An enzyme that converts the viral RNA into DNA once inside a host cell.

generation_prompt: A clean modern educational biology illustration of the HIV retrovirus, shown as a cutaway cross-section revealing its internal structure. Show these structures clearly separated and individually distinguishable: the outer viral envelope, glycoprotein spikes studding the envelope, the matrix protein layer beneath the envelope, the cone-shaped capsid (core), the RNA genome strands inside the capsid, and reverse transcriptase enzyme molecules. Style: semi-realistic medical-textbook illustration, soft even studio lighting, smooth clean surfaces, a muted palette. Calm and flat: no glossy highlights, no neon, no glow, no 3D-render sheen. Composition: a single round virus particle, centered and filling the frame, generous even margins. Solid uniform deep-charcoal background, hex #121316, edge to edge. Absolutely no text, no labels, no numbers, no letters, no leader lines, no arrows, no legend, no watermark -- the illustration only. Portrait 3:4, high resolution.
